names.primary: A Tabulated Summary and Comparison of the action of Fever Remedies
names.latin: A Tabulated Summary and Comparison of the action of Fever Remedies

indications.text: The American Materia Medica, Therapeutics and Pharmacognosy, 1919, was written by Finley Ellingwood, M.D.It was scanned by Michael Moore for the Southwest School of Botanical Medicine.
